message.content: @startuml skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0 skinparam classFontColor black skinparam classBackgroundColor white skinparam classBorderColor black skinparam stereotypeCBackgroundColor #C8E6C9 skinparam stereotypeCBorderColor #81C784 class Account { + AccountID : int + FirstName : string + LastName : string + EmailAddressUsername : string + password : string + AccountCreatedDatetime : datetime + isArchived : boolean -- + createAccount() + deleteAccount() + editAccount() + forgotPassword() } class Recipe { + recipeID : int + recipeName : string + servings : int + prepTime : time + cookTime : time + totalTime : time + isFavorite : boolean -- + createRecipe() + editRecipe() + deleteRecipe() + saveRecipe() } class RecipeImage { + RecipeImageID : int + RecipeImagePath : int + isArchived : boolean -- + AddPhoto() + DeletePhoto() } class Ingredient { + IngredientID : int + IngredientText : string + IngredientAmount : int + isArchived : boolean -- + AddIngredient() + EditIngredient() + DeleteIngredient() } class Measurement { + MeasurementID : int + MeasurementText : string -- + getMeasurement() } class Instructions { -- + getSteps() } class Step { + StepID : int + InstructionStepText : string + StepNumberOrder : int + isArchived : boolean -- + AddStep() + EditStep() + RemoveStep() } Account "0..*" -- "1" Recipe : owns Recipe "1" o-- "1" RecipeImage : has Recipe "1" *-- "*" Ingredient : contains Recipe "1" *-- "1" Instructions : has Ingredient "1" *-- "1" Measurement : uses Instructions "1" *-- "*" Step : consists of note top of Account C end note note top of Recipe C end note note top of RecipeImage C end note note top of Ingredient C end note note top of Measurement C end note note top of Instructions C end note note top of Step C end note @enduml
